ogTitle: Yallourn North vs Yalmy: Climate Safety

heading: Yallourn North vs Yalmy — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Yallourn North, Victoria and Yalmy, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Yallourn North has a lower overall climate risk score (43/100) compared to Yalmy (44/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Yallourn North or Yalmy safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Yallourn North has a flood risk score of 47/100, while Yalmy scores 58/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Yallourn North scores 64/100 for bushfire risk. Yalmy scores 54/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Yallourn North or Yalmy?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Yallourn North has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.1% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
